de.name: D2C-Marke
de.description:
Eigene Marke, eigener Shop, Endkunden direkt. Marketing-Funnel,
Personas und Retention sind das Spiel — Xentral als zentrales
Backend hinter Shop, Logistik und Retouren.

emphasis.overview: Eure Marke + Vision sind der Kompass — alles andere richtet sich daran aus.
emphasis.personas: Klare Personas → passgenaue Botschaft im Marketing + passendes Sortiment.
emphasis.channels: Eigener Shop ist Hauptkanal. Marktplätze nur als Sekundär-Spiel mit eigenen Margen-Regeln.
emphasis.marketing: Funnel + CAC + Retention — die D2C-Königsdisziplin. Hier hängt der LTV dran.
emphasis.products: Brand-Stories pro Produkt. Marge muss CAC + Logistik + Retouren tragen.
emphasis.logistics: Eigenes Lager oder 3PL — Versanderlebnis ist Teil der Marke (Unboxing, Beilagen).
emphasis.unit: AOV, CAC, LTV/CAC, Repeat-Rate, Retourenquote — kennt euch hier blind aus.
emphasis.reporting: Daily Cohort-View + ROAS pro Kanal. CRM/Lifecycle in Echtzeit.

tasks.title: Logo + Briefpapier-Vorlage
tasks.hint: Hochauflösendes Logo (SVG/PNG) + AGB-Footer für Belege

tasks.title: Shop-Integration freischalten
tasks.hint: API-Keys + Webhook-URL vom eigenen Shop (Shopify · Woo · Magento)

tasks.title: Stammdaten-CSV liefern
tasks.hint: Artikel mit Bildern · Marke · Tags · Pflichtfelder shop-fähig

tasks.title: Versand-Carrier konfigurieren
tasks.hint: DHL · DPD · UPS-Account + Etiketten-Drucker (Pick/Versand)

tasks.title: E-Mail-Vorlagen freigeben
tasks.hint: Order-Confirm · Versand · Retoure · Reklamation

tasks.title: SMTP-Setup + SPF/DKIM
tasks.hint: Postfach + DNS-Records für Beleg-Versand aus eurer Domain

tasks.title: Marketing-Tools verbinden
tasks.hint: Klaviyo · Mailchimp · Brevo für Lifecycle-Mails und Retention

tasks.title: Bank-Login (FinAPI/EBICS)
tasks.hint: Zahlungsabgleich freischalten — Daily-Cashflow + OPOS

tasks.title: DATEV-Berater-Zugang
tasks.hint: Beraternr. + Mandantennr. an Steuerberater

tasks.title: Test-User pro Rolle
tasks.hint: CS · Lager · Buchhaltung — für Schulung

tasks.title: Schulungstermine planen
tasks.hint: Pro Rolle 1-2 Sessions vor Go-Live

tasks.title: Go-Live-Datum bestätigen
tasks.hint: Cut-Over-Wochenende · Freeze-Datum · Hypercare-Plan

en.name: D2C Brand
en.description:
Own brand, own shop, end-customers direct. Marketing funnel,
personas and retention are the game — Xentral as the central
backend behind shop, fulfilment and returns.

emphasis.overview: Your brand + vision are the compass — everything else lines up against them.
emphasis.personas: Clear personas → spot-on messaging in marketing + the right range.
emphasis.channels: Own shop is the main channel. Marketplaces only as a secondary play with their own margin rules.
emphasis.marketing: Funnel + CAC + retention — the D2C masterclass. LTV hangs off this.
emphasis.products: Brand stories per product. Margin must cover CAC + fulfilment + returns.
emphasis.logistics: Own warehouse or 3PL — the unboxing experience is part of the brand (packaging, inserts).
emphasis.unit: AOV, CAC, LTV/CAC, repeat rate, return rate — know these inside out.
emphasis.reporting: Daily cohort view + ROAS per channel. CRM/lifecycle in real time.
emphasis.custom_agents: Marketing drops + lifecycle emails + retention triggers centrally orchestrated.

tasks.title: Logo + letterhead template
tasks.hint: High-resolution logo (SVG/PNG) + T&C footer for documents

tasks.title: Activate shop integration
tasks.hint: API keys + webhook URL from your own shop (Shopify · Woo · Magento)

tasks.title: Deliver master-data CSV
tasks.hint: Products with images · brand · tags · mandatory fields shop-ready

tasks.title: Configure shipping carrier
tasks.hint: DHL · DPD · UPS account + label printer (pick/pack)

tasks.title: Approve email templates
tasks.hint: Order confirmation · shipping · returns · complaints

tasks.title: SMTP setup + SPF/DKIM
tasks.hint: Mailbox + DNS records for document send-out from your domain

tasks.title: Connect marketing tools
tasks.hint: Klaviyo · Mailchimp · Brevo for lifecycle emails and retention

tasks.title: Bank login (FinAPI/EBICS)
tasks.hint: Payment reconciliation enabled — daily cashflow + open items

tasks.title: DATEV tax-advisor access
tasks.hint: Advisor no. + client no. forwarded to tax advisor

tasks.title: Test user per role
tasks.hint: CS · warehouse · accounting — for training

tasks.title: Plan training sessions
tasks.hint: 1-2 sessions per role before go-live

tasks.title: Confirm go-live date
tasks.hint: Cut-over weekend · freeze date · hypercare plan
